name: ECR repository scan on push disabled
description: Image scanning on push is disabled for this ECR repository. Without automated vulnerability scanning, container images with known CVEs can be deployed to production undetected.
remediation: Enable scan-on-push for the ECR repository. Review scan findings in the ECR console or via the describe-image-scan-findings API. Integrate scanning results into the CI/CD pipeline to block deployments of vulnerable images.
